hero.thesis: Engineers need specific career guidance to transition into leadership roles or new tech domains, and you can charge a premium for providing this niche expertise.
hero.marketSize: There are over 4 million software engineers in the U.S. alone, with a growing demand for career transitions and leadership coaching.
hero.payingEvidence: Platforms like LinkedIn Learning and MasterClass have surged with professionals spending $200-$400/hr on niche coaching.

ninetyDay.title: Define Your Niche and Value Proposition

actions.action: Research top skills engineers are transitioning into (e.g., AI, management). Use LinkedIn and Reddit threads like r/engineering.
Draft a value proposition focusing on your unique experience and how it helps engineers transition into these areas.
Create a one-page PDF outlining your coaching services and unique value.
actions.success: PDF ready to be shared with potential clients.

actions.action: Sign up for Calendly and sync it with your calendar to manage bookings.
Set up Stripe for payment processing to handle client invoices.
Draft a coaching agreement using templates from Lovable to formalize client engagements.
Create a professional LinkedIn profile emphasizing your coaching services.
Publish a blog on Medium about the importance of career transitions in engineering.
Join engineering-focused Discord servers and start engaging in discussions.
Compile a list of 50 potential clients using LinkedIn's search functionality.
Send personalized outreach emails to 10 prospects using Apollo.
Follow up with prospects who opened your email but didn't respond.
Conduct a mock coaching session with a friend and record feedback.
Update your coaching materials based on feedback received.
Schedule a free introductory session with 2 interested clients.
Conduct the free introductory sessions and present your value proposition.
Send follow-up emails with a detailed coaching proposal and pricing.
Negotiate and close deals with at least one client.
Leverage referrals by asking your first client for introductions to other engineers.
Run a small LinkedIn ad targeting engineers looking for career transitions.
Join a career coaching community on Discord to learn and network.
Gather feedback from your first client to identify areas of improvement.
Create an additional resource like an e-book or guide to offer during sessions.
Incorporate new resource into your coaching sessions.
Write a guest post for a tech career blog.
Record a podcast episode discussing engineering career transitions.
Share your guest post and podcast on LinkedIn and Reddit.
Attend a virtual engineering conference and engage in networking sessions.
actions.success: Attended 2 sessions and connected with 5 people.

actions.action: Reach out to influencers in the engineering space for collaboration opportunities.
Join a new LinkedIn group focused on tech leadership.
actions.success: Joined and active in 1 new group.

actions.action: Run a client satisfaction survey and analyze results.
Implement changes based on survey feedback to improve service quality.
Offer a discount for clients who book a package of sessions.

ninetyDay.title: Prepare for Long-term Growth

actions.action: Draft a 6-month plan for business growth and service expansion.
Explore partnerships with tech bootcamps or educational platforms for lead generation.
Set quarterly goals and review your financials and metrics.
actions.success: Quarterly goals set and financials reviewed.

ninetyDay.metric: Clear roadmap for the next 6 months.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.why: To manage and schedule coaching sessions efficiently without email back-and-forth.

toolStack.name: Stripe
toolStack.why: To process payments seamlessly and securely from clients.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: For targeted prospecting and outreach to potential clients.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $49/month for pro features.

toolStack.name: Lovable
toolStack.why: To create and manage coaching contract templates.

toolStack.name: LinkedIn
toolStack.why: For professional networking and client acquisition.
toolStack.pricing: Free, with optional premium features starting at $29.99/month.

toolStack.name: Medium
toolStack.why: To publish insightful articles and establish authority in the engineering space.
toolStack.pricing: Free to publish, membership is $5/month for additional features.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: Unlock Your Next Career Move, [Name]!

Hi [Name],

I noticed your impressive background in [Niche] and wanted to reach out. I'm [Your Name], a career coach specializing in guiding engineers like you through pivotal career transitions. Whether you're aiming for leadership roles or breaking into new tech domains, I offer tailored coaching to help you achieve your goals.

Let's schedule a quick chat to explore how I can assist you on this journey. [Calendly Link]

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial email, follow-up in 48 hours, final nudge in 72 hours.

pricing.premium: $400 per hour for a 10-session package with ongoing support.
pricing.raisingRules: Review pricing every quarter; increase by 10-15% based on demand and client feedback.

failureModes: Underpricing your services due to lack of confidence.
Failing to niche down and targeting too broad an audience.
Over-relying on a single client acquisition channel.
Ignoring client feedback and not iterating on your service.
Failing to establish a professional online presence.
Not managing time effectively and burning out.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to form an LLC for liability protection and credibility.
setup.payments: Set up Stripe for secure payment processing and invoicing.
setup.contracts: Utilize Lovable to draft and manage coaching agreements.
setup.insurance: Consider professional liability insurance to protect against potential claims.

scaling: Once you reach a steady flow of clients and consistent income, consider hiring an assistant to handle administrative tasks such as scheduling and client follow-ups. This frees up more of your time for actual coaching and strategic growth. As demand grows, you can bring on other coaches with complementary skills to expand your service offerings. Create a standardized onboarding process and training materials to maintain quality. Consider developing an online course or group coaching sessions to scale your impact without a proportional increase in time commitment. Leverage partnerships with tech bootcamps or educational platforms to reach a broader audience and generate passive income through affiliate deals.
